S.FORM: Phil Bond sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1954, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 7, Phil Bond, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: pńßil ő≤on* s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē taj ****, rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, pńßil ő≤on*, s~…ēquliq na p Ēunro. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
